headline: The First Publicly Listed Fusion Stock Just Started Trading, and It Did Not Arrive Quietly
summary: Equity Insider News Commentary — General Fusion Group Ltd. (NASDAQ: GFUZ) has begun trading on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol GFUZ following the completion of its business combination with Spring Valley Acquisition Corp. III. This debut makes General Fusion, by the company's account, the first publicly listed fusion company. It arrives with more substance behind it than the typical pre-revenue listing[1]. Built for Our World sets out the broader vision behind the company.
